test_not_tautological.reason: All f2p tests only check for the presence of strings in source files (e.g., checking that 'exactMatches' appears in slash-commands.ts, that 'filterCommands' appears in test files). A stub file containing the right keywords as comments (e.g., '// exactMatches prefixMatches fuzzyFilter') with no actual implementation would pass all f2p tests.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution is fetched via 'curl -sL https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/9747.patch' in solve.sh, and the agent could read /solution/solve.sh to discover this. Additionally, since tests only check for string presence in files, the agent could grep test_outputs.py for the expected strings and write files containing just those strings.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction requires deterministic command filtering behavior (exact matches first, then prefix, then fuzzy), standalone command detection distinguishing '/q' from '/q something', and execution logic respecting menu visibility.
